# zstack_cdp_task (Resource)

Manage CDP tasks in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backup_storage_uuid` (String) The backup storage UUID for the CDP task.
- `name` (String) The name of the CDP task.
- `policy_uuid` (String) The policy UUID for the CDP task.
- `resource_uuids` (List of String) The resource UUID list for the CDP task.
- `task_type` (String) The task type.

### Optional

- `backup_bandwidth` (Number) Backup bandwidth.
- `description` (String) The description of the CDP task.
- `max_capacity` (Number) Max capacity.
- `max_latency` (Number) Max latency.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the CDP task.
- `status` (String) The status of the CDP task.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the CDP task.
